audit_methods: Pattern checks for semantic HTML, keyboard traps, labels, reflow, motion, AEO structure, and site-level agent-readiness files when a directory is scanned
Runtime behavior, contrast ratios, and screen-reader task completion were not fully verified

legal_risk.narrative: Technical WCAG criteria mapping only. This is not a legal opinion and is not derived from warning counts.

jurisdictions.name: US ADA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; legal exposure depends on business model, sector, and jurisdiction-specific facts.

jurisdictions.name: EU EAA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence for consumer digital-service accessibility planning.

jurisdictions.name: Japan JIS
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; confirm procurement or sector requirements separately.

jurisdictions.name: Taiwan
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence only; confirm current local program, certification, and seal requirements before making a compliance claim.

jurisdictions.name: Canada ACA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; applicability depends on organization type and regulated context.

jurisdictions.name: Australia DDA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; legal assessment requires local context and counsel.

testing_recommendations: Run keyboard-only walkthrough of the primary flow.
Run a live browser audit with Playwright + axe-core when a page is available.
Listen to the page with VoiceOver or NVDA for the core task.
Treat this static score as a regression baseline, not a completion certificate.
